sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 19:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 19:1
items.html: The ascent of ZON upward caused the making of a coupling on phase three, which lowered only the level of Hochma to the Guf, and the light of Keter remained in the Rosh. Thus, the degrees descended because the light of Hochma clothed in the vessel of Keter, and the light of Bina in the vessel of Hochma, etc. It therefore follows that each and every vessel remained lacking much of that measure of light that it had in the first expansion. For this reason‎, the coarseness in the vessels had been recognized, and they were completed in a way that they will not be canceled by the light that is clothed there. It follows that the ascents of ZON caused the completion of the vessels. (Inner Light, Item‎ 5)
